title: Chowder Express
description: Allows players to fill minecarts with soup and ride them around the world, restoring hunger and gaining temporary effects as they go
body:
**Chowder Express** is a unique and fun mod that adds a new way to transport and use soup in Minecraft. With this mod, players can fill minecarts with a variety of soups and ride them around the world, restoring hunger and gaining temporary effects as they go. Whether you're looking for a quick snack or a way to boost your stats, Chowder Express has you covered. Simply fill up a minecart and ride to victory!

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
